did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study evaluated a combined Reflectance Confocal Microscopy–Optical Coherence Tomography (RCM-OCT) device for BCC detection and depth assessment. The results were obtained through manual visual correlation of imaging features with histopathology and statistical analysis (Pearson correlation) of depth measurements. No AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods were used for diagnosis, segmentation, or classification.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
